identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Transform a utilitarian Excel processing tool into a clean, 'Control Room' style dashboard that instills confidence and clarity.

usage.labels: Inter, font-semibold, uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs, text-slate-500

primary.name: International Blue
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Key Metrics

structure.sidebar: Hidden on mobile, col-span-3 on desktop (if applicable) or Top Navigation

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-white hover:bg-rose-50 text-rose-600 border border-rose-200 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.header: border-b border-slate-100 p-4 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50/50 rounded-t-xl

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

logs_console.container: bg-slate-900 rounded-lg p-4 font-mono text-xs h-64 overflow-y-auto border border-slate-800 shadow-inner

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise texture on the main background if possible, or keep it clean slate-50

hero_bg.desc: Grey container, blue and white metal locker - Use for login/landing background or subtle overlay

processing_state.desc: Stack of cargo containers - Use for 'Processing' empty state or hero image

office_vibe.desc: Clean UX Design Studio Desk - Use for 'Configuration' or 'Admin' section visuals

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure 'lucide-react' is installed for icons.
2. LAYOUT: Implement the 'Control Room' grid. The main dashboard should have a sidebar (or top bar) for navigation and a main area for the 'Tabs' (Intelipost vs ViaCEP).
3. TABS: Use the Shadcn 'Tabs' component to separate the two main functionalities.
4. UPLOAD: Create a distinct 'DropZone' component. It should be large, dashed border (border-dashed border-2 border-slate-300), and turn blue (border-blue-500 bg-blue-50) on drag over.
5. PROGRESS: When processing starts, show a clear Progress Bar. Below it, show the 'Logs Console' (black background, colored text) to give technical feedback.
6. HISTORY: The 'History' section should be a clean Shadcn Table. Use 'Badge' components for status (Success/Failed).
7. CONFIG: The Configuration section should be in a separate modal or a dedicated settings card. API Keys must be masked (type='password').
8. FEEDBACK: Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications on success/error.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and tabs.
10. DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean 'Swiss' style.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
